headline: Southside Savages: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Southside Savages carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 78.22, led by Drake Maye, Josh Jacobs, and Tetairoa McMillan. The clearest lineup pressure point is the TE slot held by Colby Parkinson at 45.3 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Drake Maye (98.3), Josh Jacobs (87.9), and Tetairoa McMillan (85.6).

sections.title: Recent Trade Impact
sections.body: No recent franchise trade met the relevance threshold in the authoritative historical trade ledger.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Colby Parkinson is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 45.3. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 10 offensive players, with 2 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 79.10.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 10 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
